permissions.fallback_msg: The pptx skill needs to read local files (presentations, XML, JSON, markdown, scripts) to analyze and process PowerPoint content.
The pptx skill needs to write files such as HTML slides, JSON inventories, repacked .pptx files, and intermediate working files during presentation creation and editing.

The pptx skill needs to run shell commands including Python scripts (unpack.py, pack.py, validate.py, inventory.py, replace.py, thumbnail.py, rearrange.py), Node.js scripts (html2pptx.js), markitdown, soffice, and pdftoppm to process presentations.
The pptx skill may need to install required dependencies such as markitdown, pptxgenjs, playwright, sharp, react-icons, LibreOffice, poppler-utils, or defusedxml.
The pptx skill needs to launch processes such as Python interpreters, Node.js runtimes, LibreOffice, and pdftoppm during presentation processing.
The pptx skill needs to load and read instruction files such as html2pptx.md and ooxml.md in full before executing presentation workflows.
The pptx skill scripts (pack.py, validate.py) may delete temporary files or failed output files during processing.
